mapper.sql: uc.id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.status, uc.order_id, uc.claimed_at, uc.used_at, c.name AS coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.scope AS coupon_scope, c.threshold_amount, c.reduction_amount, c.discount_percent, c.max_discount_amount, c.start_at, c.end_at, c.description
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.id = #{id} AND uc.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.coupon_id = #{couponId} AND uc.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uc.status ASC, c.end_at ASC, uc.id DESC

SELECT FROM user_coupons uc JOIN coupons c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.status = 'UNUSED' AND c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (c.start_at IS NULL OR c.start_at <= NOW()) AND (c.end_at IS NULL OR c.end_at >= NOW()) ORDER BY c.end_at ASC, uc.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupons (user_id, coupon_id, status, order_id, claimed_at, used_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{status}, #{orderId}, #{claimedAt}, #{usedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_coupons SET status = 'USED', order_id = #{orderId}, used_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'UNUSED'
UPDATE user_coupons SET status = 'UNUSED', order_id = NULL, used_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'USED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_coupons WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status = 'USED'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_coupons WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND status <> 'USED'
